developer_response.body: Hey, I’m sorry you feel that way about the game. The pushing works but you need to push with 2 hands and with force to work. All of the purchasable items were added 2-3 years ago, remember the is game isn’t new it’s been out since 2022. And if I made any of the current paid items free the people who already bought them wouldn’t like that at all. For example if I made pushing free, every lobby would be filled with you getting pushed and eventually overly annoying. I am constantly working on new updates since the game released as early release. I am also about to release a new secret update. And something within that update is similar to pushing but not paid. And for horror mode. It will come soon but the horror mode is an entirely separate mode from the actual game, so mods will be disabled( horror is going to be something you’ve never seen ). The reason horror is a separate gamemode is because if I were to add horror to all gamemodes as just a walk-in, then everybody in the lobby you joined would be in horror rather then the other maps. I’d like to see people exploring the main maps with other people instead of being alone because of everyone being in horror - I am responding this 3 hours after my surgery so bare with my spelling mistakes

I downloaded this game because I saw a clip on TikTok with the tower (that I really wanted to climb) so I climbed all the way to the top, got a reward in my wardrobe, and nothing. Then I gave up and wanted to explore, their were these two people flying with jet packs killing each other and being in general mean to each other, then, one of them left and one of the guys started being toxic saying the n word etc, then he got really bad, he said he wanted to f(Yk what goes here) his mum, LIKE WHAT? Then he started saying”I know the owner” I have a mod menus”etc, then he started pushing me and then started f(yk what goes here) me! Also  you basically have to pay for EVERYTHING, like I think the owner has enough money thank you, also if you see this guy he has a blue wizard hat with a jet pack and he overuses grenades.

reviews.review_title: It's not bad, but it's far from good.
reviews.review_description: My main issue with the game is that everything, and yes, I mean everything, is locked behind a paywall. This would be fine with the mod menus however something like $5 for a base mechanic is just stupid. And it's also laggy most of the time. The movement is clunky and slow, which leads to ruining the experience a lot of the time. Not bad, but I wouldn't recommend.
